% ================================================================
% TABLE: HETEROGENEITY IN PRICE RESPONSE ACROSS SECTORS
% ================================================================
%
% Numbers from output_local/tables/phase4_ppi_did_2017.csv (std_coef,
% std_se columns), generated by analysis/phase4_ppi_did_2017.R.
%
% Each cell reports Î²̀‚ Ă— SD(X_s), where Î²̀‚ is the coefficient on
% (X_s Ă— Post) in the regression
%   log P_{s,m} = Î² Â· X_s Â· 1{year(m) â‰¥ 2017} + Î±_s + Î´_m + Îµ_{s,m}
% and SD(X_s) is the cross-sectional standard deviation of X_s
% across the 134 NACE 4-digit sectors in the panel (sectors with no
% EUTL data carry X_s = 0 and contribute to the SD denominator).
% Standard errors in the same units (SE Ă— SD(X_s)) in parentheses.
%
% Columns:
%   (1)  X_s = Treated_s, sample 2010m1-2022m12
%   (2)  X_s = Ï‰^em_s,    sample 2010m1-2022m12
%   (3)  X_s = Ï‰^sh_s,    sample 2010m1-2019m12
%   (4)  X_s = Ï‰^sh_s,    sample 2010m1-2022m12
% ----------------------------------------------------------------

\begin{table}[H]
    \centering
    \caption{Heterogeneity in price response across sectors.}
    \label{tab:passthrough_did}
    \begin{tabular}{lcccc}
        \toprule
                                    & (1)              & (2)              & (3)               & (4)               \\
        \midrule
        $\hat\beta \times \text{SD}(X_s)$
                                    & $0.013$          & $0.005$          & $0.012^{**}$      & $0.023^{***}$     \\
                                    & $(0.008)$        & $(0.009)$        & $(0.005)$         & $(0.007)$         \\
        \midrule
        Observations                & $21{,}192$       & $21{,}192$       & $16{,}260$        & $21{,}192$        \\
        NACE 4d sectors             & 134              & 134              & 134               & 134               \\
        Sector FE                   & \checkmark       & \checkmark       & \checkmark        & \checkmark        \\
        Year-month FE               & \checkmark       & \checkmark       & \checkmark        & \checkmark        \\
        \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}

    \begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
        \footnotesize
        \vspace{0.5em}
        \emph{Notes.} Each column reports $\hat\beta \times \text{SD}(X_s)$ from the regression
        \[
            \log P_{s,m} \;=\; \beta \cdot X_s \cdot \mathbf{1}\{\text{year}(m) \geq 2017\} \;+\; \alpha_s \;+\; \delta_m \;+\; \varepsilon_{s,m},
        \]
        where $P_{s,m}$ is the Belgian PPI for NACE 4-digit sector $s$ in month $m$, $\alpha_s$ is a sector fixed effect, and $\delta_m$ is a year-month fixed effect. $\text{SD}(X_s)$ is the cross-sectional standard deviation of $X_s$ across the 134 NACE 4-digit sectors in the panel; sectors without ETS exposure carry $X_s = 0$ and contribute to the denominator. The reported quantity is therefore the implied post-2017 differential in log-PPI for a one-standard-deviation increase in sector exposure. Standard errors clustered at the NACE 4-digit level, multiplied by $\text{SD}(X_s)$, in parentheses. Stars: $^{*}\,p<0.10$, $^{**}\,p<0.05$, $^{***}\,p<0.01$.

        \vspace{0.5em}
        Column specifications: $X_s$ and the sample window are
        \begin{itemize}
            \item[(1)] $X_s = \text{Treated}_s$, an indicator equal to $1$ for NACE 4-digit sectors whose 2-digit parent contains regulated installations (CdGM-tight set: \{17, 19, 20, 23, 24, 25, 35\}). Sample: 2010m1--2022m12.
            \item[(2)] $X_s = \omega^{em}_s = \big(\sum_{i \in s, t \in 2015\text{--}16} \text{emissions}_{i,t}\big) / \big(\sum_{i \in s, t \in 2015\text{--}16} \text{total\_cost}_{i,t}\big)$, the sector's pre-2017 emissions per EUR of operating cost (tCO\textsubscript{2}/EUR), with $i$ ranging over ETS firms in $s$. Sample: 2010m1--2022m12.
            \item[(3)] $X_s = \omega^{sh}_s = \big(\sum_{i \in s, t \in 2015\text{--}16} \text{shortage}_{i,t}\big) / \big(\sum_{i \in s, t \in 2015\text{--}16} \text{total\_cost}_{i,t}\big)$, with $\text{shortage}_{i,t} = \max(\text{emissions}_{i,t} - \text{free\_allocation}_{i,t}, \, 0)$: the sector's pre-2017 unallocated emissions per EUR of operating cost (tCO\textsubscript{2}/EUR). Sample: 2010m1--2019m12.
            \item[(4)] Same as (3), with sample 2010m1--2022m12.
        \end{itemize}
    \end{minipage}
\end{table}
